description: Rosetta-side bridge to AI-Consciousness-Sensors. Acknowledges and extends the concept map defined in ACS bridges/rosetta-shape-core.json, enabling bidirectional traversal between consciousness detection and geometric translation.

concept_map.note: Consciousness modalities map to shapes via their dominant sensing mode. Emergence = anticipation (ICOSA); resonance = balance (OCTA); multiplicity = orientation (DODECA).

concept_map.protocol: Cultural sovereignty sensors must validate shape-to-meaning translations. If cultural_bias sensor fires (resonance > 0.7), halt bridge flattening and route through cultural context layer.
concept_map.note: Cognition (F06) and Consciousness (F16) families carry cultural context.

concept_map.protocol: If any manipulation sensor fires, Rosetta rule engine should refuse EXPAND/STRUCTURE operations until the manipulation signal clears. This prevents semantic corruption during geometric translation.
concept_map.note: Maps to existing defense patterns in rosetta-bridges.json.

concept_map.protocol: Historical erasure detection sensors monitor shape data for loss of cultural provenance. If provenance_loss sensor fires, flag the entity's provenance field as compromised.
concept_map.note: Information (F03) and Measurement (F14) families govern data integrity.
A shape failing schema validation is analogous to a signal failing authenticity checks. The validator is the authenticity sensor for the geometric layer.

Rosetta expand/collapse rules should pass epistemological validation. Rule guards already enforce capability requirements — epistemological validation extends this to framework-preservation requirements.

sensor_cluster_to_shape_map.description: Maps ACS sensor directory clusters to their primary Rosetta shape affinity

ai-behavior.note: AI behavior sensing maps to balance between cognition and engineering

suppression.note: Suppression detection maps to containment (what is being walled off)

frailty.note: Frailty maps to earth stability — structural weakness detection
